content.fact_text: Creation of production-ready package.json for catalog and inventory controller service, including core dependencies like Zod, Opossum, Pino, and Decimal.js.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines production-ready dependencies for catalog and inventory controllers. Enables TypeScript compilation, linting, and testing workflows.
provenance_data.utility: Provides essential package metadata, scripts, and dependency management for the catalog/inventory microservice.

content.source_code:
{
  "name": "@acn/catalog-inventory-controller",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Production-ready catalog and inventory controller service",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc",
    "start": "node dist/index.js",
    "lint": "eslint 'src/**/*.ts'",
    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "jest --coverage"
  },
  "author": "ACN Actuator",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "dependencies": {
    "decimal.js": "10.4.3",
    "express": "4.19.2",
    "opossum": "8.3.1",
    "pino": "9.3.2",
    "pino-pretty": "11.2.2",
    "zod": "3.23.8"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/express": "4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "29.5.12",
    "@types/node": "20.14.10",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "7.14.1",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "7.14.1",
    "eslint": "8.57.0",
    "jest": "29.7.0",
    "ts-jest": "29.1.5",
    "typescript": "5.5.3"
  }
}
